creator: steve@stephen-fisher.com
text:
My e-mail address has changed from stephentfisher@yahoo.com to steve@stephen.fisher.com.  I am planning on decommissioning the yahoo address.  The port is otherwise still up-to-date.

Fix: 

The attached patch simply changes my e-mail address from stephentfisher@yahoo.com to steve@stephen-fisher.com in the ansiprint port.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
